dashboard.label: POA&M Report
dashboard.description: Plan of Action and Milestones - Open findings requiring remediation (shows latest checklist per host/STIG only)

search.query: | dedup asset_host_name | sort asset_host_name | table asset_host_name
| dedup stig_title | sort stig_title | table stig_title
| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" | stats count
| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT I" | stats count
| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT II" | stats count
| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT III" | stats count
| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" | stats dc(asset_host_name)

| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT I" | eval POA_M_ID="POA&M-".substr(md5(vuln_vuln_num.asset_host_name),1,8) | table POA_M_ID, asset_host_name, asset_host_ip, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num, vuln_rule_ver, vuln_rule_title, vuln_finding_details, vuln_comments | rename POA_M_ID AS "POA&M ID", asset_host_name AS "Host", asset_host_ip AS "IP Address", stig_title AS "STIG", vuln_vuln_num AS "Vuln ID", vuln_rule_ver AS "Rule", vuln_rule_title AS "Weakness Description", vuln_finding_details AS "Finding Details", vuln_comments AS "Scheduled Completion/Milestones" | sort Host, "Vuln ID"

| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT II" | eval POA_M_ID="POA&M-".substr(md5(vuln_vuln_num.asset_host_name),1,8) | table POA_M_ID, asset_host_name, asset_host_ip, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num, vuln_rule_ver, vuln_rule_title, vuln_finding_details, vuln_comments | rename POA_M_ID AS "POA&M ID", asset_host_name AS "Host", asset_host_ip AS "IP Address", stig_title AS "STIG", vuln_vuln_num AS "Vuln ID", vuln_rule_ver AS "Rule", vuln_rule_title AS "Weakness Description", vuln_finding_details AS "Finding Details", vuln_comments AS "Scheduled Completion/Milestones" | sort Host, "Vuln ID"

| search asset_host_name="$selected_host$" stig_title="$selected_stig$" vuln_status="Open" category="CAT III" | eval POA_M_ID="POA&M-".substr(md5(vuln_vuln_num.asset_host_name),1,8) | table POA_M_ID, asset_host_name, asset_host_ip, stig_title, vuln_vuln_num, vuln_rule_ver, vuln_rule_title, vuln_finding_details, vuln_comments | rename POA_M_ID AS "POA&M ID", asset_host_name AS "Host", asset_host_ip AS "IP Address", stig_title AS "STIG", vuln_vuln_num AS "Vuln ID", vuln_rule_ver AS "Rule", vuln_rule_title AS "Weakness Description", vuln_finding_details AS "Finding Details", vuln_comments AS "Scheduled Completion/Milestones" | sort Host, "Vuln ID"
